pageNotFound.title: cyPage not found
pageNotFound.paragraph: cyIf you typed the web address, check it is correct.
pageNotFound.paragraph2: cyIf you pasted the web address, check you copied the entire address.
pageNotFound.paragraph3: cyIf the web address is correct or you selected a link or button, contact us by email or telephone.
pageNotFound.heading: cyEmail
pageNotFound.paragraph4: cyUse the find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab) to get your local court’s email address.
pageNotFound.paragraph5: cyIf you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
pageNotFound.paragraph8: cyFind out about call charges (opens in new tab).

serviceUnavailable.title: cySorry, the service is unavailable
serviceUnavailable.paragraphMinutes: cyYou will be able to use the service in {{minutes}} minutes.
serviceUnavailable.paragraphDateAndTime: cyYou will be able to use the service from {{time}} on {{date}}.
serviceUnavailable.paragraph2: cyFor help with your case, contact us by email or telephone.
serviceUnavailable.heading: cyEmail
serviceUnavailable.paragraph3: cyUse the find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab) to get your local court’s email address.
serviceUnavailable.paragraph4: cyIf you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
serviceUnavailable.paragraph7: cyFind out about call charges (opens in new tab).

technicalError.title: cySorry, there is a problem with the service
technicalError.paragraph2: cyWe saved your answers. They will be available for 30 days.
technicalError.paragraph3: cyFor help with your case, contact us by email or telephone.
technicalError.heading: cyEmail
technicalError.paragraph4: cyUse the find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab) to get your local court’s email address.
technicalError.paragraph5: cyIf you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
technicalError.paragraph8: cyFind out about call charges (opens in new tab).

accessDenied.title: cyYou do not have access to this page
accessDenied.paragraph: cyContact us if you think you should have access, or if you need help with your case.
accessDenied.heading: cyEmail

accessDenied.paragraph3: cyIf you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
